glosses.en: Goodbye (on the phone); talk to you soon

translations.fr: Je dis au revoir au téléphone.
translations.ru: Я говорю по телефону до свидания.
translations.vi: Tôi nói tạm biệt qua điện thoại.
translations.nl: Ik zeg tot ziens aan de telefoon.
translations.uk: Я кажу до побачення по телефону.
translations.hi: मैं फोन पर अलविदा कहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg sier ha det på telefon.
translations.id: Saya bilang sampai jumpa di telepon.
translations.sv: Jag säger hej då i telefon.
translations.ja: 電話でさようならと言います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; predicates the act of speaking.
Preposition introducing the fixed formula PP; head of the prepositional phrase.
Nominalized expression; object of the preposition 'auf' in the farewell formula.

sentences.target: Wir sagen am Telefon auf Wiederhören.

translations.de: Wir sagen am Telefon auf Wiederhören.
translations.fr: Nous disons au revoir au téléphone.
translations.ru: Мы говорим по телефону до свидания.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nói tạm biệt qua điện thoại.
translations.nl: Wij zeggen tot ziens aan de telefoon.
translations.uk: Ми кажемо до побачення по телефону.
translations.hi: हम फोन पर अलविदा कहते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi sier ha det på telefon.
translations.id: Kita bilang sampai jumpa di telepon.
translations.sv: Vi säger hej då i telefon.
translations.ja: 私たちは電話でさようならと言います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person plural; predicates the act of speaking.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition selecting dative, introducing the location NP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'am', giving the location/context of speaking.
Preposition introducing the fixed formula PP; head of the prepositional phrase.
Nominalized expression; object of the preposition 'auf' in the farewell formula.

sentences.target: Meine Oma sagt laut auf Wiederhören.

translations.de: Meine Oma sagt laut auf Wiederhören.
translations.es: Mi abuela dice adiós en voz alta.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère dit au revoir à voix haute.
translations.it: Mia nonna dice arrivederci ad alta voce.
translations.ko: 우리 할머니는 크게 안녕히 계세요라고 말해요.
translations.ru: Моя бабушка громко говорит до свидания.
translations.pt: Minha avó diz tchau em voz alta.
translations.he: סבתא שלי אומרת להתראות בקול רם.
translations.tr: Büyükannem yüksek sesle hoşça kal diyor.
translations.vi: Bà tôi nói tạm biệt thật to.
translations.nl: Mijn oma zegt hardop tot ziens.
translations.uk: Моя бабуся голосно каже до побачення.
translations.hu: A nagymamám hangosan azt mondja, viszlát.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी ज़ोर से अलविदा कहती हैं.
translations.pl: Moja babcia głośno mówi do widzenia.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου λέει αντίο δυνατά.
translations.nb: Bestemoren min sier ha det høyt.
translations.id: Nenek saya mengucapkan selamat tinggal dengan suara keras.
translations.sv: Min mormor säger hej då högt.
translations.ro: Bunica mea spune la revedere cu voce tare.
translations.cs: Moje babička nahlas říká na shledanou.
translations.fi: Mummoni sanoo hei hei kovalla äänellä.
translations.ja: 祖母は大きな声でさようならと言います。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with 'Oma'; introduces the NP serving as subject.
Common noun; head of the subject NP modified by 'Meine'.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; predicates the act of speaking.
Adverb of manner modifying 'sagt'; indicates how the speaking is performed.
Preposition introducing the fixed formula PP; head of the prepositional phrase.
Nominalized expression; object of the preposition 'auf' in the farewell formula.

sentences.target: Ich freue mich auf das Wiederhören.

translations.de: Ich freue mich auf das Wiederhören.
translations.en: I look forward to talking again.
translations.fr: J'ai hâte de parler à nouveau.
translations.it: Non vedo l'ora di parlare di nuovo.
translations.ru: Я жду, когда мы снова поговорим.
translations.vi: Tôi mong được nói chuyện lại.
translations.nl: Ik kijk ernaar uit om weer te praten.
translations.uk: З нетерпінням чекаю нашої наступної розмови.
translations.hi: मैं फिर से बात करने के लिए उत्सुक हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg gleder meg til å snakke igjen.
translations.sv: Jag ser fram emot att prata igen.
translations.cs: Těším se, až si zase popovídáme.
translations.da: Jeg glæder mig til at tale igen.
translations.ja: また話すのが楽しみです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; used reflexively with 'mich' to express being glad.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; reflexive object of 'freue'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces the PP complement of 'freue mich'.
Definite article, neuter accusative; determiner for 'Wiederhören'.

tokens.surface_en: the reunion call (the goodbye on the phone)
tokens.explanation: Common noun; head of the NP governed by 'auf' and determined by 'das'.
